arts.ttl: Spanish Police make three arrests during El Clásico for racist chants aimed at Barcelona players
arts.sum: El Clásico is always the one fixture in Spanish football that raises emotions and passion more than any other. Sometimes, however, this can spill over into some unsavoury scenes. This…

arts.ttl: 3 arrested for Clásico racism to Yamal, Raphinha
arts.sum: Spanish police have arrested three people in relation to racist insults aimed at Barcelona duo Lamine Yamal and Raphinha during last month's Clásico at the Bernabéu.

arts.ttl: Lionel Messi praises 'spectacular' Barcelona with Hansi Flick's side as legend reveals his pride at seeing La Masia products impress
arts.sum: Barcelona are currently six points clear at the top of LaLiga, albeit having played a game more than their closest challengers Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: ‘Barcelona eyeing Ajax full-back: Liverpool also interested’
arts.sum: FC Barcelona are keeping a close eye on Devyne Rensch's contract situation, according to Diario Sport on Saturday (via Voetbal Primeur).

Hansi Flick discusses impact of Lamine Yamal absence from Barcelona side - 'I'll have to ask them' - Football España Hansi Flick on offside controversy, responds to Lionel Messi comments and discusses Barcelona formation change - Football España

arts.ttl: Barcelona receive boost in bid to make Spotify Camp Nou return as soon as possible
arts.sum: It has been 17 months since Barcelona started renovation work on the Spotify Camp Nou, and while they had hoped to be back at the iconic stadium by the end of this year, it will not be possible. For now, the working objective is that the Catalan giants will return home in mid-February, and the […] The post Barcelona receive boost in bid to make Spotify Camp Nou return as soon as possible appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: ‘We all feel stronger’ - Lewandowski hails Flick’s impact at Barca
arts.sum: Flick is known for his intense approach both on the training pitch and in games, and Lewandowski says the fitness work has made a big difference. Lewandowski also spoke about the support he receives off the pitch from Flick and how conversations with the coach are really important.

arts.ttl: Saturday's La Liga predictions including Celta Vigo vs. Barcelona
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's La Liga fixtures, including Celta Vigo vs. Barcelona.

arts.ttl: When is Celta Vigo - Barcelona? How to watch on TV and stream online
arts.sum: Despite a recent 1-0 defeat to Real Sociedad, Barcelona has shown they can compete for every trophy this season, largely thanks to the efforts of star players like Robert Lewandowski and Raphinha. Their most recent game was a 2-2 draw against Real Betis.

arts.ttl: Barcelona Predicted Lineup vs. Celta Vigo: La Liga
arts.sum: Barcelona looks to maintain its six point lead over Real Madrid in La Liga when it visits Celta Vigo to resume league action.
